docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JUL-29-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-21-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-06-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPERANCES BY PLAINTIFFS SIMON AND JANET CHAN WITH THE HELP OF SWORN CANTONESE INTERPRETER ESTELLA LIU AND DEFENDANT CAMILA ANDREA BURGOS GALINDO WITH THE HELP OF SWORN SPANISH INTERPRETER JOHN PAUL MARTINEZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-29-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-29-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, SIMON
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-21-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-18-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$65.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, SIMON AS TO DEFENDANT ANDREA, CAMILA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,535.00 FILED BY CHAN, SIMON AS TO DEFENDANT ANDREA, CAMILA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-18-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF SIMON CHAN RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, SIMON

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2016 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO OCT-06-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 IN ORDER TO BE HEARD IN CONJUNCTION WITH THE MATTER ENTITLED JANET CHAN VS. CAMILA BURGOS, SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT NUMBER CSM-16-853191. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF SIMON CHAN & CAMILA ANDREA. ALFRED LIU WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND SERVED AS CANTONESE SPEAKING INTERPRETER FOR PLAINTIFF. JEAN PAUL MARTINEZ WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND SERVED AS SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER FOR DEFENDANT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, SIMON AS TO DEFENDANT ANDREA, CAMILA
MAILING OF PLAITIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT TO DEFENDANT RETURNED: ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN UNABLE TO FORWARD
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF NEEDING MORE TIME FOR SERVICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, SIMON
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-09-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANDREA, CAMILA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, SIMON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDREA, CAMILA $4,535.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,600.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
